name: dev-toolkit
description: TechJuiceLab's personal Claude Code plugins: git worktree squash-merge, secret enforcement + 1Password workflow, and asdf/devcontainer toolchain doctor.

plugins.name: git-worktree
plugins.description: Squash-merge the current git worktree branch back into its target with a researched Conventional-Commits message. Stops on conflict, never force-pushes, never skips hooks.

plugins.name: secret-guard
plugins.description: Blocks plaintext secrets at write/commit/push time (PreToolUse hook) and ships a 1Password (op://) workflow skill so Claude references secrets correctly instead of hardcoding them.

plugins.name: toolchain-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnoses asdf .tool-versions drift vs installed runtimes (asdf-doctor subagent) and devcontainer-vs-host parity (devcontainer-parity skill).
